titlestmt.titleproper: Anonymous nudist and erotic photography collection7781
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-27 23:26:22 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Anonymous nudist and erotic photography collection
did.physdesc: Correspondence, movie film, photographs, publications, slides
did.abstract: Photographic prints, slides, negatives, and short films; publications, brochures, books, and correspondence surrounding the work and personal life of a studio photographer who was active in New York City in the 1960s and 1970s.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The New York Institute of Photography was founded in 1910 to train people in professional photography.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographic prints, slides, negatives, and short films; publications, brochures, books, and correspondence surrounding the work and personal life of a studio photographer who was active in New York City in the 1960s and 1970s. Visual materials in the collection include 960 photographic prints, 2212 slides, 490 negatives, and 11 motion pictures. Categories of material include professional work; personal images and ephemera; personal nudes; and erotica. Most of the images in the professional category are studio portraits and photographs of artists and their work, or of the artwork itself, many from "Club Burr," evidently a group of artists in New York City; another subgroup in the professional category relates to the collector's studies at the New York Institute of Photography.

Personal images include 600 slides, negatives and prints of female nudes, most of them studio shots reminiscent of photographs in Playboy magazine in the 1960s and 1970s; and images taken at an unidentified nudist colony, circa 1960s. The erotic visual materials include photos of male and female nudes, and nude self-portraits resembling "physique" photos by noted photographers such as Bruce of L.A., Douglas of Detroit, Your Model Service and AMG/Bob Mizer, as well as erotic films.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Professional photography by the Photographer Boxes 1, 2, 6
Series V. New York Institute of Photography grades and tests Boxes 3-5

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Anonymous Nudist and Erotic Photography Collection, #7781. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
The name of the photographer has been removed from the guide their name has been replaced with the word Photographer.

did.unittitle: Series I. Professional photography by the Photographer
Photographs of various people, places, objects
Fire at 30 St and 12 Ave, NYC
Photographer and female nude in the woods and meadows
Photographer and female partner in the woods
Photographs of exhibit of erotica artwork
Erik Imports-film, magazine, novel, sex toy distributor
Male prostitute business card with rates
Correspondence between Photographer, parents, and sister
Pages from books and newspapers with living tips
Correspondence with attorneys to sell land in Alaska
Documentation of Photographer's work as a seaman on various steamers
Legal dispute with US Selective Service System
Binder: The Signal School training manual
Photographer's life documents-legal papers, rental agreements, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Camp Archery Assn.; North American Hunting Club; Signal SVC BN

did.unittitle: Collection of photographs of Photographer throughout his life
Matchbox with an image of a woman in a bathing suit on the cover, whose suit comes off when you open the box.
Candid photos with friends at the beachm, fair, pool
Photographer and friends-random assortment of photos
Series V. New York Institute of Photography grades and tests
Colorized black an white photography practice

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Some are amateur footage, some are commercial pornography.
